title: Nebby's Too Many Create Mods
body:
# Overview
**The goal of this modpack was to add too many add-ons to Create.**

## Features
- Create
- Additional automation options for Create
- Additional decorative features for Create
- New biomes and structures
- New weapons, armor, and tools
- Expanded farming mechanics
- Space exploration
- World Map and gravestones
- Quality of Life and performance improvements
- Blåhaj!
